CustomField.formula: HYPERLINK( "/lightning/r/WorkOrder/" & Id & "/view", IF( ISBLANK(Services_Needed__c), WorkOrderNumber, CASE( Services_Needed__r.RecordType.DeveloperName, "Grease_Trap", "IGT", "Drain_Cleaning", "HYD", "Interceptor", "EGT", "Used_Cooking_Oil", "UCO", "Waste_Run","WR", "" ) & "-" & WorkOrderNumber ) )
CustomField.label: Work Order Number Display
